pattern: 現在簡單式:習慣與事實(第三人稱單數動詞+s)
zh: 表示習慣或事實;主詞是他/她/它(單數)時,動詞要加 s/es
ex: The post office opens at eight every day.
exZh: 郵局每天八點開門。
q: She ___ to work by bus every day.
note: 主詞 She 是單數,現在簡單式動詞要加 es → goes。

pattern: 現在進行式:be + V-ing
zh: 表示此刻正在發生的動作;常見提示 now、Look!、Listen!
ex: Look! The mailman is delivering a package now.
exZh: 看!郵差正在送包裹。
q: Listen! The phone ___ now.
note: Listen! 表示此刻正在發生,用 be + V-ing → is ringing。

pattern: 過去簡單式:V-ed 或不規則過去式
zh: 表示過去已結束的動作;常見提示 yesterday、ago、last...
ex: I sent the letter yesterday.
exZh: 我昨天寄了那封信。
q: We ___ the package last week.
note: last week 是過去時間,動詞用過去式 → received。

pattern: 未來式:will + 原形動詞
zh: 表示未來會發生的事,或當下做的決定
ex: I will deliver your package tomorrow.
exZh: 我明天會把你的包裹送到。
q: He ___ call you tomorrow.
note: tomorrow 表未來,用 will + 原形動詞。

pattern: 未來式:be going to + 原形動詞
zh: 表示計畫好的未來,或有跡象的預測
ex: We are going to move next month.
exZh: 我們下個月要搬家。
q: They ___ going to open a new shop.
note: 主詞 They 用 are;be going to + 原形 表計畫。

pattern: 過去進行式:was/were + V-ing
zh: 表示過去某時刻正在進行的動作,常被另一個短動作打斷
ex: I was reading when the bell rang.
exZh: 鈴響時我正在看書。
q: She ___ cooking when I came home.
note: 主詞 She 用 was;過去進行式 = was + V-ing。

pattern: 現在完成式:have/has + 過去分詞(p.p.)
zh: 表示從過去持續到現在,或剛完成;常見 for、since、already、yet
ex: I have worked here for three years.
exZh: 我在這裡工作三年了。
q: She ___ already finished her work.
note: 主詞 She 用 has;already 是完成式提示 → has finished。

pattern: 被動語態-現在:am/is/are + 過去分詞
zh: 主詞「被」做某事(現在)
ex: These boxes are checked every morning.
exZh: 這些箱子每天早上都會被檢查。
q: The mail ___ delivered every day.
note: 主詞 mail 為單數,現在被動 = is + p.p. → is delivered。

pattern: 被動語態-過去:was/were + 過去分詞
zh: 主詞「被」做某事(過去)
ex: The meal was prepared by the chef.
exZh: 那餐是由廚師準備的。
q: The letter ___ yesterday.
note: 過去被動 = was/were + 過去分詞 → was sent。

pattern: 動詞後接不定詞 (to + 原形)
zh: want、hope、decide、plan、need 等後面接 to V
ex: She decided to take the job.
exZh: 她決定接下這份工作。
q: I want ___ a reservation.
note: want 後面接不定詞 → to make。

pattern: 動詞後接動名詞 (V-ing)
zh: enjoy、finish、avoid、suggest 等後面接 V-ing
ex: They enjoy working together.
exZh: 他們喜歡一起工作。
q: She avoided ___ the question.
note: avoid 後面接動名詞,不接不定詞 → answering。

pattern: 介系詞 + 動名詞 (V-ing)
zh: after、before、without、by 等介系詞後面動詞用 V-ing
ex: Check the address before sending the letter.
exZh: 寄信前先核對地址。
q: Wash your hands before ___ lunch.
note: before 是介系詞,後面動詞用 V-ing → eating。

pattern: 關係代名詞 who(指人,主格)
zh: 先行詞是「人」且在子句中當主詞時,用 who
ex: The teacher who helped me is kind.
exZh: 幫助我的那位老師人很好。
q: The man ___ called you is my uncle.
note: 先行詞是人、且在子句中當主詞,用 who。

pattern: 關係代名詞 which / that(指物)
zh: 先行詞是「物」時,用 which 或 that 連接
ex: The box which arrived today is heavy.
exZh: 今天送到的那個箱子很重。
q: This is the letter ___ came this morning.
note: 先行詞 letter 是物,用 which(或 that)。

pattern: 關係代名詞 whose(所有格)
zh: 表示「…的」,連接所屬關係,人或物皆可
ex: The man whose car is red works here.
exZh: 那台紅色車子的車主在這裡工作。
q: I know a girl ___ father is a mailman.
note: 表示「她的父親」這種所屬關係,用 whose。

pattern: 條件句:If + 現在式, 主詞 + will + 原形
zh: 表示「如果…就會…」的真實、可能情況
ex: If it rains, I will take a taxi.
exZh: 如果下雨,我就搭計程車。
q: If you hurry, you ___ catch the train.
note: 真實條件:if 子句用現在式,主句用 will + 原形。

pattern: 假設語氣-與現在事實相反:If + 過去式, 主詞 + would + 原形
zh: 對「現在」的相反假設(其實不是這樣)
ex: If I were you, I would study harder.
exZh: 如果我是你,我會更用功。
q: If I ___ you, I would take the job.
note: 與現在相反,be 動詞一律用 were。

pattern: 過去完成式:had + 過去分詞(進階)
zh: 表示「過去的過去」,比另一個過去動作更早完成;常見 by the time、before
ex: The train had left before we arrived.
exZh: 我們到達之前,火車已經開走了。
q: By the time I got there, the meeting ___ already ended.
note: 兩件過去的事,先發生的用過去完成式 had + 過去分詞。

pattern: 假設語氣-與過去事實相反:If + had p.p., 主詞 + would have p.p.(進階)
zh: 對「過去」的相反假設(其實沒發生)
ex: If I had known, I would have helped you.
exZh: 如果我早知道,我就會幫你了。
q: If she ___ studied harder, she would have passed.
note: 與過去相反:If + had + 過去分詞。

pattern: 連接詞:although / though(雖然)
zh: 表示讓步、對比;「雖然…」,同句不可再加 but
ex: Although it was late, he kept working.
exZh: 雖然很晚了,他仍繼續工作。
q: ___ it was raining, we still went out.
note: 前後語意相反,用 Although 表「雖然」。

pattern: because + 句子 / because of + 名詞
zh: because 後接「主詞+動詞」,because of 後接「名詞」
ex: We stayed home because of the storm.
exZh: 我們因為暴風雨待在家。
q: The flight was late ___ the bad weather.
note: 後面是名詞片語 the bad weather,要用 because of。

pattern: too + 形容詞 + to V(太…以致於不能…)
zh: 表示程度過頭,結果做不到某事
ex: He was too tired to finish the work.
exZh: 他太累了,無法完成工作。
q: The box is ___ heavy to carry.
note: too + 形容詞 + to V = 太…而不能…。

pattern: not only ... but also ...(不僅…而且…)
zh: 對稱連接兩個並列的詞或句,前後詞性要一致
ex: She is not only smart but also kind.
exZh: 她不僅聰明而且善良。
q: He speaks not only English ___ also Japanese.
note: 固定搭配 but also,前後詞性要對稱。

pattern: had better + 原形動詞(最好…)
zh: 帶勸告語氣的「最好做某事」
ex: You had better see a doctor.
exZh: 你最好去看醫生。
q: You had better ___ early today.
note: had better 後面直接接原形動詞 → leave。
